descriptions.1: Sent to affiliate when application for the program is pending approval.
descriptions.2: Sent to affiliate when application for the program has been approved.
descriptions.3: Sent to affiliate when application for the program is rejected.
descriptions.4: Sent to affiliate when a new coupon code is assigned to them.
descriptions.5: Sent to affiliate when new sale is generated.
descriptions.6: Sent to affiliate when generated sale has been approved by store owner.
descriptions.7: Sent to affiliate when generated sale has been declined by store owner.
descriptions.8: Sent to affiliate when commission has been paid out.
descriptions.9: Sent to affiliate when requesting a password reset.
descriptions.10: Sent to affiliate when get added to the affiliate program by the store owner.
descriptions.100: Sent to store owner when new affiliate successfully register.
descriptions.101: Sent to store owner when affiliate generate a new sale.
